title: The Touska, the Iranian-Flagged Ship Seized by U.S. Forces, Was Under Sanctions
summary_full: Marines are searching thousands of containers aboard the Touska, an Iranian cargo ship that the Navy disabled and seized on Sunday.
summary_public: Marines are searching thousands of containers aboard the Touska, an Iranian cargo ship that the Navy disabled and seized on Sunday.
